svg.text: Proprietary analysis engine with external intelligence feeds · 70+ modules · zero runtime dependencies for core
OSV.dev Batch · GHSA · NVD/NIST · FIRST EPSS · CISA KEV · NVIDIA CSAF · Grype DB · OpenSSF Scorecard · MCP Registry (427+)
MCP Stdio Proxy · 4 Inline Scanners · 5 Detectors · Fleet Mgmt · Trust Scoring · Alert Pipeline
GitHub Action · Docker/Helm · Slack · Jira · ServiceNow · Drata · Vanta · Webhooks

Read-only · Agentless · Never stores credentials · Only package names sent to APIs · Sigstore signed · Apache 2.0
